summary.goal: Add battle mode to the pokedex grid — select two owned pokemon and initiate a battle (closes #16)
decisions: extended useCollection to expose ownedMongoIds (Map<game_id, mongo_id>) — the battle endpoint needs MongoDB ObjectIds but the grid only tracks game integer IDs; a map between them avoids a second API call at battle time
battle confirmation shown as a fixed bottom bar rather than a modal — keeps the two selected pokemon visible in the grid so the user can verify their choice before committing
